title: Warm Smoky Peruvian Flour Tortilla Tiradito
description: A smoky and tender Peruvian dish featuring flour tortilla, perfect for a brunch mood, with a low sodium content, served in a tiradito form
instructions: Preheat a non stick skillet over medium heat
In a small bowl mix together smoked paprika, garlic, coriander, salt, and black pepper
Brush the flour tortillas with olive oil and sprinkle the smoked paprika mixture evenly over the tortillas
Place the tortillas in the skillet and cook for 2 minutes on each side, until they are warm and slightly charred
In a separate bowl mix together lime juice, chopped red onion, and chopped aji amarillo pepper
To assemble the tiradito place a cooked tortilla on a plate and spoon the lime juice mixture over the top
Repeat the layers one more time and garnish with additional chopped red onion and aji amarillo pepper if desired
